## LibraryData.resolveFileTreeSourceForSubLibrary() function

Resolves a file tree source for a specific sub-library.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function resolveFileTreeSourceForSubLibrary(source: ILibraryFileTreeSource, subLibraryId: SubLibraryId): Result<IResolvedSubLibrarySource | undefined>;
```

Result&lt;[IResolvedSubLibrarySource](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.iresolvedsublibrarysource.md) \| undefined&gt;
